entry.title: Calculate yearly absences pro-ratio for Compensation Planning
entry.content:
If you enjoy my blogs, please let me know by clicking on the Kudo button just above! Your support inspires me to write more.

 

Introduction: The Challenge

Recently, my friend Alex, a compensation consultant, approached me with an interesting problem. He said, "Stéphanie, I have a client who needs to determine the percentage of yearly presence for compensation purposes, so I can pro-rate the compensation calculation based on their presence rate. Can you think of something?" To which my response was, "Challenge accepted!"

In this blog, I'll share the Proof of Concept (PoC) I developed for Alex. It calculates the total number of days of absences (from time-off) and the presence rate for each employee for a specific year. Once this data is made available (in a custom object), Compensation Planning can work its magic with it. Although, to my knowledge, this PoC was not implemented, I thought it was too cool not to share and let it sit on a shelf!!

 

Solution: Version Simple

The solution is straightforward. I'll assume that if you're reading this blog, you have a basic understanding of creating custom MDF objects, rules, and attaching them to the object. So, let's skip to the important and fun stuff!

What I'm proposing is creating a custom MDF object (without an effective date). We'll add two decimal fields to it: one to store the number of absences in days (this field is technically optional, but it helps to explain the concept when both fields are visible) and another to store the attendance rate for the previous year (in this case, 2024), as shown below:

 

Once the object is created, you can add it to your People Profile (or, in my case, the Full Profile — how modern of me in early 2025! 😄).

Next, it's essential to know which rule functions are available. It's always a good practice to review the "Implementing Business Rules in SAP SuccessFactors" guide periodically, especially the Function A-Z section, or to check the Change History section for new features (yes, I really do that).

Let's try using a function that seems appropriate for this case and see the results. (Remember, this is a proof of concept—there might be a better function to use, but this one will do the trick for now!):

 

Count Number of Leave of Absence Days()This function calculates the number of days for a given period of time.

 

Let's build our rule for 2024. In the first field, we'll count the number of days of absences in 2024. In the second field, we'll calculate the "Presence Rate," which is defined as:

where the Absence Rate is calculated as:

 

And then let’s assign our rule On Save in our beautiful custom object (as shown in my first image). Time to test:

  1. Go to an Employee File check out our Absence Count object:
  2. Select Edit on the object
  3. And Save

Our Absence Count shows 0 days of absence and a presence rate of 1 (or 100% present). Great!

Now, let's test when adding an absence:

  1. Add an absence in our employee Time Administration Workbench
  2. Go back to our object and select Edit
  3. And Save

Our Absence Count was updated to reflect 31 days of absence (the entire month of December 2024), and the presence rate was adjusted accordingly. Good again! It seems to work well.

The last step is to make the object available for all employees who were present in 2024. This is quite simple: you just need to create an import file for our custom object with the employees' IDs. The "On Save" rules will be triggered during the import, updating all employees in the file with their absence count and presence rate. Here is a sample of a one-line import and the result:

 

Solution: Version Intermediary!

I presented the simple version of the solution to Alex, to which he replied: "But Stéphanie, can you exclude some absences from your count? I need more flexibility. Also, if an employee was hired during the year, can you count the period before they were hired as an absence?". To which my response was, "Ok then, challenge accepted…again!"

There are numerous rule functions available for handling absences in SuccessFactors, such as:

 

Get Absence Days()With this function, you can calculate how long an employee has been absent within one year for a specific time type.
Get Absence In Days For Period()This function calculates cumulated absence days for the given date period and a given time type.
Get Absence In Days For Period Based On Calendar Days For Time Types()This rule function calculates the total number of absence days in given duration for the time types provided.
Get Absence In Days For Period Based On Working Days For Leave Of Absence Time Types()This rule function calculates the number of absence days during a given duration for the given time types.
Get Absence In Days For Period Based On Working Days For Time Types()This function calculates the cumulated absence days for the given duration and given time types.
Get Absence In Days For Period Based On Working Days For Time Types Excluding Weekdays()With this rule function, you can exclude the weekdays of your choice when getting the sum total of absence days
Get Absence in Days For Period with Threshold()This rule function calculates the sum of absence days in a given period for the time types provided where individual Employee Time duration exceeds a given threshold value.
Get Absence In Days Or Hours For Period Based On Deduction Quantity For Time Types()This rule function calculates the total deduction quantity, in days or hours, for absences in a specified period and with the specified time types.
Get Absence In Hours For Period()This function calculates cumulated absence hours for the given date period and a given time type.
Get Absence In Hours For Period For Time Types()This function calculates the cumulated absence hours for the given duration and given time types.
Get Completed Months Of Time Types In Period()This rule function calculates the number of complete months for which the employee was absent in a given period for the time types provided.
Get Number of Absences for Period for Time Types()This function calculates the number of absences of a list of time types within a given period.

(my point being, you can do a lot with rules when you explore the available functions and experiment with them!)

The function to use to count days of absence for specific time type (absence) is Get Absence In Days For Period Based On Calendar Days For Time Types().

For employees hired in 2024, we'll count the days between January 1, 2024, and their hire date, adding this sum to our absence count.

I implemented these three calculations as variables:

Now, we'll set up two conditions:

  • For employees hired before 2024: We'll count their absences for specific time types and calculate the presence rate.
  • For employees hired during 2024: We'll add the hire pro-rata to our absence count.

Now, let’s test!

Paternity Leave (6003) is not included in our absence count. Let’s see the result of our object when an employee goes on Paternity Leave:

 

Long Term Disability (6001) is included in our absence count. Let’s see the result of our object when an employee goes on Long Term Disability:

Finally, for employees hired during the year (2024), the days prior to their hire are included in our absence count. Let's see the result of our object for an employee hired on July 1st, 2024:

There we go, challenge resolved! Now, we just need to load our import file again to update the values for all employees.

 

Solution: Version Expert!

I went back to Alex to present the intermediary version of the solution. Alex said, "This is great, Stéphanie! I could use this in compensation planning. But for 2025, can you make your object reflect live calculations as time passes?”. Truth be told, Alex did not push it there, but I thought it would have been a good follow-up question. I also wanted to implement this it because it would look better in my demo system 😊.

So, here it goes...

For the expert mode solution, we'll create two new fields for the year 2025 (the ongoing year at the time of writing this blog) on our custom objects.

  • We'll need to have IF conditions of the rule so that our absence count and our pro-rata are dynamic as time advances.
  • Additionally, we'll have IF conditions for when the year is finished and the counter become static.

Here is a look at our variables, what they do, and where we will use them in our rule:

 

And now, the rule itself! (It's starting to look a bit more complicated, but remember, we're in the Expert version of the solution!):

What's left is to trigger the rule automatically every day so that the counts and rates get updated as time passes in 2025!

To achieve this, we'll need to use a mix of Integrations in Integration Center and Intelligent Services. I won't go into the details of Integration Center and Intelligent Services here (this blog has already taken way longer to write than planned), but I like the setup with the following three integrations:

 

 

Absence Count – Intelligent Service - Hire

Trigger: Hire intelligent Service
Description: This integration will initialize / create the portlet for newly hired employees. Simply map the employee user ID to the external code of the custom portlet!
Note that if you are going-live with this solution you should to an upload of the custom object on all active employee prior to the go-live to initialize the portlet.

Absence Count – Intelligent Service – Time-Off

Trigger: Time-Off intelligent Service
Description: This integration will update the portlet whenever a time-off is saved in the system.

Absence Count – Schedule Daily Job

Trigger: Schedule daily job
Description: This integration will update the portlet daily, calculating days of absences and the presence rate as 2025 progresses.

Now, just ensure your intelligent services (hire and time-off) are set up to trigger the integrations mentioned above and schedule the third one. And there you go! The custom objects will reflect live data and get updated every day. Expert mode solution in a nutshell!

 

Conclusion

To finish…

First, the goal of this blog was to demonstrate how to make absence/presence pro-ratio data available in SuccessFactors for use in the Compensation Planning module. I presented three solutions to achieve this. I've developed these as proof of concepts and never had the chance to implement them. So, if you get to use this solution, please let me know. It will make me happy to know it was useful!

Second, many thanks to my friend, Alex Rodriguez, for bringing me these challenges every now and then!

Lastly, I just want to say that now I know how hard it is to keep it short when writing a blog about time 😉!

Cheers,

Stéphanie

entry.title: How to correct non-reconcilable documents to insert them properly in ACDOCA and FAGLFLEXA?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on a Z development that performs mass upload of accounting documents using the BAPI BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST. Recently, we discovered that documents containing a purchase order do not get saved in the necessary tables (such as ACDOCA and FAGLFLEXA), which prevents them from being reconciled later. Documents without a purchase order are posted correctly and appear in both ACDOCA and FAGLFLEXA, but those containing the PO are not inserted into these tables, causing a problem for reconciliation. Has anyone experienced this kind of situation? Are there any methods or SAP Notes to insert these documents into ACDOCA and FAGLFLEXA tables to make them reconcilable? Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: COGS split into fixed and variable in Public Cloud
entry.content: As per business requirement we need to split activity cost as fixed and variable in margin analysis, but in configuration there is no option to select fixed and variable. Is this option available in SAP public cloud?

entry.title: Inter company costing in Public Cloud
entry.content: As per current setup we have 2 manufacturing company codes and 1 selling company code, once the material is produced the same will be transferred to selling company. In selling company we are valuating materials with standard cost and we need to read the standard costing from manufacturing company. How can we setup (cross company code costing) this scenario in the system?

entry.title: Integrate vendor master from S4 to teamcenter
entry.content:
Background:

We are planning to implement S4 PCE as our ERP system and Teamcenter as our PLM system. In order to keep the integrity of the vendor master, we need to integrate S4 with Teamcenter as the destination to sync vendor master.

Existing solution:

According to our consultant's proposal, it is possible to generate an file carrying vendor master from S4 and transport it to Teamcenter using SFTP, then Teamcenter will further read and process the file to CRUD vendor master, Which seems a totally customizing solution.

Any better out-of-box solution?

As we all know that we have lots of out-of-box interface from SAP to expose vendor master for other system comsumption. Or may be any webhook interface to set up in teamcenter.

So I would appreciate it if someone can provide more practice on how can we implement this integration scenario, any share experience or discussion are warmly welcome!!!!🥰

entry.title: Access https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/GWSAMPLE_BASIC/ doesn't work
entry.content:
Hi,

The accesss to https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/GWSAMPLE_BASIC/ doesn't work,

The following error occurred while at https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/sap/bc/gui/sap/its/webgui .

And go to https://register.sapdevcenter.com/SUPSignForms/?, the user name and password cannot be loaded.

 

Please Help!

Thanks-

entry.title: Batch Number Transactions Report in SAP Business One Web Browser?
entry.content:
Hi All

Anyone knows whether Batch Number Transactions Report in SAP Business One Web Browser?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: WFA on Hana Succession Metric: Applicable Succession...
entry.content:
Hi @MissZP ,

Because of the limitation in WFA on HANA where we have to use employee ID to do key mapping with Workforce fact, I think it was setup as such in the template.  If you want to tweak it using Position MDF, you need to have separate complex fact table with Position MDF as the sourcing.  However, you have to create separate hierarchies for this fact table as there is no employee ID in Position MDF thus you cannot reuse any hierarchy or dimension from Workforce fact table (i.e. Position fact on the left side and Workforce fact on the right side in the key mapping setting).

You can still do key mapping from Workforce or Succession fact table (i.e. Workforce or Succession fact table on the left side, Position fact table on the right side in the key mapping setting) to this new fact table based on position field.  That way you can reuse dimension/hierarchy from Position fact table for any metrics in Workforce or Succession fact tables.

cc. @Keegan

entry.title: Re: Inter company costing in Public Cloud
entry.content: Please refer to note 3087811 - Cross company code costing is not supported for legal valuation in Public

entry.title: Re: Check for open LBs by consolidation group while packing
entry.content:
Hi @joka89 ,

My opinion:

"My question would be: How is the worker at the packing station able to see if all warehouse orders / pick-HUs arrived at the packing bin? I want to prevent that the HU is closed prematurely which would result in multiple HUs / packages."  -> Please use user controlled  Pick Pack Pass in Warehouse creation rule so picker can pick WO/WTs in their respective area and place in packing station.

  • System-controlled pick, pack, and pass function

    With this setting, the system specifies the sequence for processing the warehouse orders and corresponding pick-HUs.

    It creates a higher-level warehouse order that contains all other warehouse orders that have been created. Only the first warehouse order in the sequence is active, all other warehouse orders are inactive. The sequence in which the system orders the warehouse orders corresponds to the sequence that you have defined in Customizing for the activity areas in the warehouse order creation rules.

    1. During warehouse order creation, the pick-HU determination determines the suitable pick-HUs for all warehouse tasks of the warehouse order.

    2. The system checks the warehouse order type. If you activated the pick, pack, and pass function, the system creates a higher-level warehouse order that contains multiple warehouse orders sorted by activity area. The system only passes on the "standard" warehouse orders to resource management in EWM.

  • User-controlled pick, pack, and pass function

    With this setting, the system creates the warehouse orders and the corresponding pick-HUs the same as for the system-controlled pick, pack, and pass function. However, all created warehouse orders are active, and no sequence for processing them exists. The user takes a warehouse order that is valid for his or her activity area.

Details Document: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/1ce1f9f520fe4a8ea11387d445da3b42.html

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/pick-pack-pass-process-in-ewm/ba-p/13348328

Addition:  in Warehouse Process Type, Complete pick WR checked - So picking tasks would create either for all items or none.

"Is there any way to check in /SCWM/PACK i.e. if the picking for the consolidation group is complete without having to monitor the ODO on a different monitor? What would be the recommendation?" -> I think above will fix for such case...work center layout, checked consolidation group validation while repacking.

Please let us know if further questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Cost allocation on basis of production quantity in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Client has a requirement to allocate costs based on quantity produced in the system. Are there any options to enable this? 

In addition, would like to know if there are any enhancement capabilities for the cost allocation process in SAP public cloud?

entry.title: I'm unable to access SAP Gateway Demo system : ES5
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m unable to access the SAP Gateway Demo system.

I am getting a 503 error

entry.title: Re: I'm unable to access SAP Gateway Demo system : ES5
entry.content: Hello, my friend. We have similar problems and look forward to your questions being answered. I called for help 40 minutes ago.

entry.title: Re: How to divide XML message records (node) wise and pos...
entry.content:
Hi @prathmesh009 
The issue is related to the namespaces.
I removed the namespaces with XSLT, and it was processed successfully.
Please find the solution in the following link [https://mega.nz/file/v1pA0Q5T#1xUuSi6lv5fq7mBCz8LsPJQrKySVn1WwRQP43m7vVc8]
Note: I cannot upload the zip to this platform; you can download the iFlow from the link.

You can see that it is working in runtime.

Note: Additionally, without the 'm' and 'd' namespaces, you can transform quickly if needed. 

If this is helpful, it would be great if you could mark it as the correct answer.

Best regards 🖖🏻

Ricardo

entry.title: SAP B1 integration framework scenario steps sequence
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to full fill below requirements in B1if v1 platform. Got some questions hope you can advice me.

I need get some records from database with sql query, let's call it "RecordsWO". Loop the "RecordsWO" and call B1 object to update. After all the objects are updated, get another records from database and call it "RecordsWeight". Loop the "RecordsWeight" and call B1 object to update them. After these I need call a SQL to update the job status.

At first, I created below scenario step. One main step to control the sequence, and two sub-steps to update the B1 objects. Of course, it won't work. Because you don't know when the sub-step all be finished after you put the update work into the B1i queues.

 

After that, I try to use the "call b1 object" atom instead of "call sub-step". In my opinion, this should works. You can loop the records and call b1 object to update. This is  synchronous execution. But during the test, the message keeps in processing and won't finish. It seems get stuck in queue and without any exception.

So do you have any ideas about this? or any good solution to make the steps sequence executed? really thanks!

#B1 #B1if

entry.title: Re: EWM Good Receipt Posting - INV20006 Error
entry.content:
Hi, Nikhil

If the SFC is confirmed through SFC complete service or plug-in, it looks so far packing on packing plug-in is the only approach to trigger EWM GR.

If the SFC is confirmed through quantity confirmation, you can use EWM GR service.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Unable to parse hcicertificate using KeystoreService
entry.content:
Hi @Uma_Soundarapandian
Could you please share more details on the integration you want to achieve?
I dont fully understand, but I believe you are not using the certificate correctly. Additionally, you might not be using the correct certificate.
Let me know your requirements, and I will try to support you.

Best regards 🖖🏻
Ricardo

entry.title: Price List Upload via Import in SAP - price list for item does not exist
entry.content:
I got this error when trying to update prices via SAP - Data Import - Price List - here are my data (the 1st 2 rows are not in my upload data) and I have saved the file as. txt.

Can anyone let me know what the error means? Thanks 

Item No.Item No, Base Price List No.Item No, FactorItem No, Unit Price
SKUPricelist No. Price
VCU-0003-200-OS110.01
VCU-0004-200-OS110.01

entry.title: Re: Intermittent Http_Communication_Failure Error in ABAP...
entry.content:
Hi @Ravi_Bharti08 
I have encountered this issue before; I recommend reviewing that all SAP app servers have the corresponding certificates. Additionally, if this is a hosted environment, I would raise this with your basis and network team to validate that all app servers have proper access to the BTP Cloud Integration host and port. In HA environments, we have found that some app servers have not been allowed access or are missing the corresponding SSL Identity or certificates depending on whether they are using Client Certificate Authentication, OAuth2.0, or Basic Auth.

Best regards 🖖🏻

Ricardo

entry.title: Re: Intermittent Http_Communication_Failure Error in ABAP...
entry.content: I would also like to point out that is extremely rare that your BTP Cloud Integration tenant to be down. But if you are having a huge volume of calls to the endpoint in short periods of time, then it would be a good idea to open a ticket to SAP operations so your tenant could be scaled up accordingly to your volume needs.

entry.title: Re: What's the difference between ACTUAL_DIST and PLAND_D...
entry.content:
Hi @EmirhanBat,

Please see the example below and let us know if you have further questions.

Example: Freight Charge calculation based on planned distance in freight order before cargo/truck journey started to destination...charge calculation based on agreement with carrier partner so before start it shows the approximate...distance comes from lane,longitudelattude, map...etc depends on the process.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/a41a33ec0ad441678da62366a4e91c8d.html?locale=en-US

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Font-Style for iOS - change Font size?
entry.content:
Thanks Bill, for instance I am trying to change the font size on SectionHeaderItem.Label, GridRowItem or ObjectHeader so I am trying to find out what the possible values for UIFont.texstyle in iOS. I have tried italic( this comes up as possible value in the editor) and also different options from https://developer.apple.com/documentation/uikit/uifont/textstyle which I would think is compatible with? but ether seem to work for me. I have also tried font-color and color and didn't work for iOS neather.

I am also trying to change background of the objectCell on selection or at least first just change the background color to proof it can be done somehow dynamically later but as per of my example below that didn't work nether..

As example:

{
    "Controls": [
        {
            "FilterFeedbackBar": {
                "ShowAllFilters": false,
                "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
            },
            "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "_Name": "SectionedTable0",
            "Sections": [
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.ObjectTable",
                    "_Name": "SectionObjectTable0",
                    "Header": {
                        "_Type": "SectionCommon.Type.Header",
                        "_Name": "SectionCommonTypeHeader0",
                        "AccessoryType": "None",
                        "UseTopPadding": true,
                        "Caption": "Caption",
                        "Items": [
                            {
                                "_Type": "SectionHeaderItem.Type.Label",
                                "_Name": "SectionHeaderItemTypeLabel0",
                                "Visible": true,
                                "Position": "Left",
                                "Title": "Label",
                                "Styles": {
                                    "Label": "labelSize"
                                }
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "ObjectCells": [
                        {
                            "ObjectCell": {
                                "ContextMenu": {
                                    "PerformFirstActionWithFullSwipe": false
                                },
                                "_Type": "ObjectTable.Type.ObjectCell",
                                "_Name": "bugtest",
                                "Title": "Title",
                                "Visible": true,
                                "Selected": false,
                                "Subhead": "Subhead",
                                "Footnote": "Footnote",
                                "Description": "Description",
                                "DisplayDescriptionInMobile": true,
                                "StatusText": "Status",
                                "SubstatusText": "Substatus",
                                "AccessoryType": "None",
                                "PreserveIconStackSpacing": true,
                                "Styles": {
                                    "Title": "backgroundchange",
                                    "Subhead": "backgroundchange",
                                    "Description": "backgroundchange",
                                    "Footnote": "backgroundchange",
                                    "StatusText": "backgroundchange",
                                    "SubstatusText": "backgroundchange",
                                    "BackgroundColor": "backgroundchange"
                                },
                                "AvatarStack": {
                                    "Avatars": [],
                                    "ImageIsCircular": true,
                                    "ImageHasBorder": false
                                },
                                "AvatarGrid": {
                                    "Avatars": [],
                                    "ImageIsCircular": true
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    ],
                    "HighlightSelectedItem": false,
                    "Selection": {
                        "ExitOnLastDeselect": true,
                        "LongPressToEnable": "None",
                        "Mode": "None"
                    }
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "_Type": "Page",
    "_Name": "CSSIssue",
    "ActionBar": {
        "Items": [],
        "_Name": "ActionBar3",
        "_Type": "Control.Type.ActionBar"
    }
}
 
Styles.less:
 
.labelSize{
  font-style: italic;                     // or I have tried with extraLargeTitle
  font-color: #0000FF;              // This does not seem to work neather
  color:#0000FF                        // This does not seem to work neather
} 
.backgroundchange{
  background-color: #0000FF;
 
}

entry.title: Re: consuming SOAP CPI services from S4HANA or Payroll vi...
entry.content:
Hi @JuanCamelo 
Exchanging the certificates to allow trusted communication is just one of the steps needed to achieve Mutual TLS Authentication or Client Certificate Authentication.

You must also configure a valid certificate (signed by a trusted certificate authority, "CA") in your SAP Payroll system. Then, import this certificate into SAP BTP Cockpit via a Process Integration Instance Key.

Please find all the instructions to create the Service Instance and Key https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/creating-service-instance-and-service-key-for-inbound-authentication?locale=en-US

Please find the steps to configure the Client Certificate Authentication for Integration Flow Processing: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/client-certificate-authentication-for-integration-flow-processing?locale=en-US

Please find information on How Client Certificate Authentication works.
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/client-certificate-authentication-inbound-cloud-foundry-environment?locale=en-US

 In Summary:

Step 1: Have a properly signed certificate in your Payroll system.
Step 2: Create a Service Instance and Service Key (External Certificate) in BTP Cockpit (you need to paste the PEM public certificate from your Payroll system)
Step 3: Import the Cloud Integration certificate into your Payroll system for SSL communication.

Let me know if you have follow-up  questions after reviewing the information I shared.

Best regards 🖖🏻

Ricardo

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi Gaurav, Expected solution for your problem is mentioned below:-

Possible Solutions

1. Fix the Hardware Key Stability

You can stabilize the hardware key by:

  • Setting a fixed hostname and container ID.

  • Mapping /etc/hostid from the host to the container (Linux only). 

  • Alternatively, patching the system to always generate the same hardware key (hacky but effective).

    Steps to try:

    In your Docker run command (or compose file), use:

    --------------------------------------------------------------------
    bash
     
    docker run --name a4h \
    --hostname=a4h.local \
    --add-host=a4h.local:127.0.0.1 \
    -v /your/local/path:/sybase \
    -e SAP_SYSTEM_SID=A4H \
    -e SAP_SYSTEM_PASSWORD=YourPassword \
    -p 3200:3200 -p 3300:3300 -p 8443:8443 \
    sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01
    --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    This alone may not fix the Hardware Key issue unless the underlying OS/container logic generates it consistently. If not:

    • Try exporting the HOSTNAME environment variable inside the container, and editing /etc/hostid if your host allows that (some distros restrict it).

      🔄2. Apply a New License on Each Restart (semi-automated)

      If you can’t stabilize the hardware key:

      • Just request a new license every time the hardware key changes.

      • Automate it as part of the container startup:

        1. Parse the hardware key from transaction SLICENSE.

        2. Submit it manually to SAP Minisap.

        3. Upload the new license via SLICENSE or with saplicense tool.

          Temporary Fix: View Hardware Key

          You can get the current hardware key from inside the container like this:

           

          bash
          docker exec -it a4h bash saplicense -get
           
          OR from SAPGui in tcode SLICENSE.

          Thanks

          Kushal_Sambhunath_Banerjee

entry.title: Re: Sequential Multicast suppressing error details
entry.content:
Hi @EoinCollins 

I understand that you want to capture not just the camel error but also the information from the ODATA response to process in your error handling.

I am going to share two examples of how SAP handles these scenarios.

Scenario A: Calling ODATA in S/4HANA

Step 1: Call the ODATA API

Step 2: Capture some information from the response 

Step 3: Use specific groovy to capture the corresponding information

Scenario B: Calling ODATA (Batch) in S/4HANA

Step 1: Prepare the Batch Request

 Step 2: Call ODATA API

Step 3: Use Groovy to check for Errors

 Step 4: Use Groovy to throw the error

I hope this answers your question and helps you to design a proper solution for your specific requirement.

Best regards, 🖖🏻
Ricardo

entry.title: Extensibility using SAP Health Data Services for FHIR
entry.content:
🔥 Simple and easy to bring business extensibility using Structure Definitions and Search Parameters
🔥 You can add specific data elements to existing FHIR resources using extensions, letting you capture information beyond the standard fields.
🔥 Profiling allows you to constrain and customize FHIR resources, defining which elements are mandatory, their data types, and value sets, ensuring data consistency.
🔥 The platform supports the creation and management of entirely new custom FHIR resources when standard resources don't quite fit the bill.
🔥 These extensibility mechanisms empower you to adapt FHIR to your unique business workflows and regulatory requirements.

Try it out: https://lnkd.in/dGHu3Sm3

Read more: https://lnkd.in/dQej-VSG

Ulla

entry.title: Re: BW Query statistics not available for CDS-based Queri...
entry.content:
Hi,

would you please confirm if there is RSADMIN parameter RSDDSTAT_GLOBAL_OFF = X in the system(see KBA 3544561)? If you are familiar with ABAP debug, you may set break-point at METHOD _insert_evdata_db / CL_RSDD_STATOLAP for trouble shooting.

Best Regards,
Sheldon

Hi,

Looks like it is down for now:-

thanks,

entry.title: Re: Intermittent Http_Communication_Failure Error in ABAP...
entry.content:
consider retry:-

DATA: lv_retry TYPE i VALUE 0,
      lv_success TYPE abap_bool.

WHILE lv_retry < 3 AND lv_success = abap_false.
  TRY.
      lo_http_client->send( ).
      lo_http_client->receive( ).
      lv_success = abap_true.
    CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lx_error).
      lv_retry = lv_retry + 1.
      WAIT UP TO 1 SECONDS.
  ENDTRY.
ENDWHILE.

Thanks

entry.title: Golden Arrow not showing on Alert
entry.content:
Hi can you please help on my query - the golden arrow is not showing on Alert - I need the golden arrow on the doc number?

Thank you.

SELECT T0."DocNum", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocDate" FROM OINV T0 WHERE
T0."DocDate" = CURRENT_DATE
and
T0."DocTotal" <= 0

entry.title: Re: Limitation on storage locations
entry.content: @jagdeepsingh83 That's right. There are 26 letters in the English alphabet - my bad. That number can go up if you count national characters like Polish Ą, Ę or German Ä, Ö, etc. Any way, the limit is way above 1M, which is more than enough.

entry.title: Re: How to add survey link to email template in SAP Sales...

entry.title: Re: Error FAA_POST214 when reversing Asset Document of Le...
entry.content:
Hi Jeremy,

Thanks for your suggestion.

Following this note 2544536, I have created a new segment with transfer date as 01.01.2024 (I cannot change Transfer Date in original Legacy Transfer Segment because its status is already set as "Complete" and system does not allow to revert transfer status to previous stage). But even after creating new segment, system is still not allowing to reverse the Legacy Asset documents in 2024. Its merely because SAP only allows such posting as long as only fiscal year is open in Asset Accounting. So solution of note 2544536 totally depends on condition of maximum one year open.

At this point, i don't see any feasible solution allowing to reverse Legacy Asset documents in 2024 (when both 2024 and 2025 are open). I don't know if there is any possibility to make only 2024 open, do the required reversal and then close 2024 to re-open 2025. If you can still think of any other solution, then please do let me know. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Triggering side effect on press of Delete button
entry.content: Did you find the way to trigger the side effort for delete button?

entry.title: STO PO creation through BAPI
entry.content:
Hi All,

           I'm creating STO PO through BAPI_PO_CREATE1, while executing this I'm facing ME 083 Enter supplier error. I have maintained correct document type, suppling plant and other details whatever we maintain during manual creation of STO PO. Can you suggest any solution?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Title/Sections
entry.content:
I guess what I meant is what is the best way to group things together in sections, for instance have a section/Title 1 that might have 2 controls underneath and each control might have it's own subtitle. I have tried to use Object header as a title for each section( please advice if this is the best way to have title sections). Once I used Object header at the top the control underneath is nicely indented without grey space so the control looks part of the section/title however if I add another control after then there is always a grey area added even if I switch off all padding options. Then if I add an extra Object header to create a new section there is an extra grey area between this and the next control which was not there on the top Object header.

As a general idea it will be good if we can use CSS to remove padding/margin between components so for instance section components can stick together without gaps, for example header>next components or between 2 formcells( one with 3 divisions and another with 2) ... See my example below:

entry.title: Re: ECT-226339 - New Experience people profile rating num...
entry.content: Hi Tracy, The current design is intended to simplify the view in the summary card. We will display the rating value only if the rating value field is set as visible in the data model. If the rating value field is set as invisible, we will display the label instead. At the moment, we do not support configuration to toggle between displaying the value or label in the initial view. I’d recommend submitting an Influence Idea so we can evaluate the demand from customers. Thanks, Roan

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Object table Single Select mode instead of mu...
entry.content: Thanks, I was thinking on an scenario where the user selects an item from the list and then can press 3 different action buttons.

entry.title: Re: Need help to convert the below code to SAP 7.4 syntax
entry.content:
Since the maximum number of segments is not specified, I am providing the snippet below based on my assumptions. Please modify it according to your requirements.

DATA: lt_edidd  TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF edidd,
      lt_edidd1 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF edidd.
CONSTANTS: BEGIN OF c_idoc,
             e1edp01 TYPE edidd-segnam VALUE 'E1EDP01',
             e1edp05 TYPE edidd-segnam VALUE 'E1EDP05',
             werks   TYPE werks_d VALUE 'GB55',
             pb00    TYPE kschl VALUE 'PB00',
             za01    TYPE kschl VALUE 'ZA01',
             zv00    TYPE kschl VALUE 'ZV00',
             za05    TYPE kschl VALUE 'ZA05',
           END OF c_idoc.

* If MAXIMUM number of same E1EDP05 segment is 1
lt_edidd = VALUE #( ( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000001'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01
psgnum = space
hlevel = '01'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-werks )
( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000011'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
psgnum = '000001'
hlevel = '02'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-pb00 ) ).

SORT lt_edidd BY segnam psgnum.

IF line_exists( lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ] ).
  IF lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ]-sdata = c_idoc-werks. "sdata is structure with WERKS then use "-SDATA-WERKS"
    DATA(lv_segnum) = lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ]-segnum.
    IF line_exists( lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ] ).
      IF lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ]-sdata = c_idoc-pb00.
        lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ]-sdata = c_idoc-za01.
      ELSEIF lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ]-sdata = c_idoc-zv00.
        lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05 psgnum = lv_segnum ]-sdata = c_idoc-za05.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
    CLEAR lv_segnum.
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.

cl_demo_output=>display( lt_edidd ).

* If MAXIMUM number of same  E1EDP05 segment is more than 1
lt_edidd = VALUE #( ( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000001'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01
psgnum = space
hlevel = '01'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-werks )
( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000011'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
psgnum = '000001'
hlevel = '02'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-pb00 )
( mandt = sy-mandt
docnum = '00000001'
segnum = '000012'
segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
psgnum = '000001'
hlevel = '02'
dtint2 = 1000
sdata = c_idoc-zv00 ) ).

SORT lt_edidd BY segnam psgnum.

IF line_exists( lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ] ).
  lv_segnum = lt_edidd[ segnam = c_idoc-e1edp01 ]-segnum.
  lt_edidd1 = VALUE #( FOR wa IN lt_edidd
                      ( mandt = sy-mandt
                      docnum = wa-docnum
                      segnum = wa-segnum
                      segnam = wa-segnam
                      psgnum = wa-psgnum
                      hlevel = wa-hlevel
                      dtint2 = wa-dtint2
                      sdata = COND #( WHEN wa-segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
                                       AND wa-psgnum = lv_segnum
                                       AND wa-sdata = c_idoc-pb00
                                       THEN c_idoc-za01
                                      WHEN wa-segnam = c_idoc-e1edp05
                                       AND wa-psgnum = lv_segnum
                                       AND wa-sdata = c_idoc-zv00 THEN c_idoc-za05
                                      ELSE wa-sdata )
                      ) ).
  CLEAR lv_segnum.
ENDIF.

cl_demo_output=>display( lt_edidd1 ).

entry.title: Re: How to add survey link to email template in SAP Sales...
entry.content:
Hi Ulla and all,

I have tried out the survey link via 'Feedback' feature in SAP C4C v2 and it worked as mentioned on the SAP note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3533836

As of now, it appears that V2 supports survey links exclusively through Qualtrics, unlike V1, where C4C out-of-the-box survey links could be directly embedded into survey emails.

entry.title: Help Needed:Function Module for Creating Work Center with Person/Position Assignment (IR01) W/o BDCs
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are currently working on automating the creation of Work Centers using transaction IR01 in SAP. As part of this process, we also need to assign Persons or Positions (HR objects) to the Work Center.

Instead of using BDC (Batch Data Communication), we are looking for a function module or BAPI that can handle both the creation of the Work Center and the assignment of Persons/Positions to it in a clean and reliable way.

Has anyone implemented this kind of functionality before? If so, could you please share:

  • The function module(s) or BAPI(s) used

  • Any prerequisites or tips to be aware of

  • How the assignment to HR objects (Persons/Positions) was handled

Your input would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Unable to parse hcicertificate using KeystoreService
entry.content: Hi Ricardo, Thanks for your reply. My requirement is to connect CPI with SharePoint via Microsoft Entra Login using client certificate authentication type. Since there is no OAuth Client Certificate Type in Security material, I am trying to use Microsoft provided java classes in groovy script to get AccessToken. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/java/api/com.azure.identity.clientcertificatecredentialbuilder?view=azure-java-stable As per this document page, pfxCertificate() method accepts certificate in InputStream format. First, I used .pfx file which works for non-SAP systems to connect SharePoint. Next, tried hcicertificate provided by SAP in CPI keystore (exported its .cer certificate and shared it with EUC team to upload them for the same Login ID in ENtra). But both options gave same error "Failed to parse the certificate for the credential: DER input, Integer tag error". Please let me know if you need any additional detail, thank you.

entry.title: Re: Duplicate run of integration flow consuming event from event mesh
entry.content: @Ryan-Crosby Thanks for the response. I am using Event Mesh of Integration Suite. Can you please clarify where the queue setting is 'set to require acknowledgement' ?

entry.title: NOT ABLE TO POST PO FOR NLAG MATERIALS
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

kindly suggest me on this not able to post a po for NLAG material now, but usually able to post previously ..

this is the error which showed .

 

Regards,

zareena

entry.title: Re: "Talent Card Like" report created in Story Report?
entry.content:
Hi Drose,

You can create Talent Card like reports. However, Story Reports isn't the intended tool for it. But I have seen some nice examples created by customers. When you have the employee ID as a Story filter then you can use the File > Export function and enable batch processing. You can then select your story filter and select the x-number of employees. It will then generate the report for each employee on a separate page.

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Monitor Supplier Confirmations - Date Variance
entry.content:
Hello SF

The date variance field shows you a date variance. 

Positive ( + ) delivery arrives later than planned

Negative ( - ) delivery arrives earlier than planned

0 - No deviation, delivery as planned

However, there are Alterations in Supplier Confirmations. SAP automatically recognizes the deviation if the confirmed date is later than the planned date.

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation - changes?!
entry.content:
Hi Sanne,

Adding to Jeremy's information, you can check this KBA and it has recent blog, which answers your query.

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003526213

Best Regards,

Annapurna

entry.title: Duplicate run of integration flow consuming event from event mesh of SAP Cloud Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a doubt related to event message consumption in SAP Cloud Integration. I am consuming an event topic configured in Event Mesh capability within SAP Integration Suite.

 

And created a topic subscription in the above queue. This event is sent from S/4HANA Cloud system when a sales order item is changed.

 

 

I am consuming the event in Cloud Integration process using AMQP sender adapter

 

 

 

 

Now when a sales order item is changed in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, I see the iFlow is triggered successfully but there always are two runs in the log:

 

Also the queue in event mesh is not cleared even after successful completion of the message in cloud integration process consuming the event.

 

1. Why is it triggering two runs of the same consumer integration process?

2. Why is the queue not getting cleared after integration flow completes.

Best regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud, embedded edition – the Way Ahead
entry.content:
Hello @monicasfarcioc1 

I'm sorry have not seen any written statement, either.

But what I can tell you is that Joule in the current version of my S4HC public Test tenant is not able to provide any simple answer about available key figures in eSAC stories, even if this seems easy from an enduser perspective.

I guess this is one more reason to retire it, to avoid efforts of Joule/Just ask integration in the eSAC.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Manage Purchase Contracts does not shown any PC
entry.content:
Hello Sridhar,

it could possibly be due to the authorizations, so check whether the user roles have the appropriate display authorization and check whether there is a separate Fiori app authorization for displaying.

Once you have checked this, you can check whether all filters have really been removed. It may be that no filter is visible, but a filter could be set unconsciously, e.g. a field is filled with an empty line.

Check whether there is a problem with the synchronization or the data.

Make sure that no setting in the customizing or backend is blocking the display.

Also test the problem in a test environment to see if it is specific to the production environment.

 

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Cost allocation on basis of production quantity in SA...
entry.content:
Hi Achintya,

It is not clear from question on which cost allocation. If you are looking for cost allocation using Universal Allocation based on produced quantity, please use SKF (stat key figure)  function in Universal Allocation. Create SKF for production quantity with proper UoM. Then maintain rule in Universal Allocation cycle - segment that allocation is based on SKF and give the SKF you created for the Production Quantity.

If you are looking for allocation in different area not Universal Allocation, please let me know.

entry.title: Re: Delivery Split Based on Item Quantity in Sales order
entry.content:
Hi Chaiphon, I know, this thread is 10 years old, but some requirements never die 🙂
the link you posted seems not to exist anymore and searching the hub with 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_SPLIT_DEC' didn't bring it up either. If this message gets to you, do you still happen to have the snippet... I'm facing exactly that challenge
Thanks;
Regards
Lars

entry.title: Re: GTS Hard Block, follow-up documents created
entry.content:
Hi Annika,

the block of follow up documents is controlled under "Subsequent Functions" in this customizing step. The 3 checkboxes for preventing delivery creation, purchase requisition creation and output should be activated, if those preventions should be active. I am sure that you already tried to activate them.

Additionally, it is possible to control the prevention on two levels: 1. Document Type and 2. Document Type + Company Code.
Please try to change setting "Activation Level" to "Document Type" or check if there are any other settings for the combination of Document Type and Company Code (navigation via folder at the left side bar).

Furthermore, there are BAdis that can control the transfer of documents as well, e.g. "BAdi: Control Interface Calls from Sales Documents (SD0A)". The BAdis are overwriting the control settings in customizing.

Hope this helps.

Best regards
Fabian

entry.title: Re: Story reporting - Last Trans Seq
entry.content:
Hi Mirjam,

In Stories the filed is called different. It's called "Effective Latest Change" which will show a "Y" for the latest transaction in case there are multiple transactions on one day.

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Reporting on all Indirect Reports with Story Reporting
entry.content:
Hi mgheorghiuaur,

Have you already tried importing the Standard Template: Employee Hierarchy Report. This report goes up to 5 levels but you can extend it to include more levels.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PEOPLE_ANALYTICS/1a17ad0982664c629f8af7d47a631672/9206f3e31f954d97a97ae056983789b8.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: How to automate clearing status of Bank Items when po...
entry.content:
Hi Meri, 
@Melle1028 

I'm afraid I can't answer your question about the "clearing status" of bank statement items...

However, as to your question about an autoamted process, have you ahd a look at the following Help Portal content? 

- Overview on Automatic Bank Statement Processing
- How to Automate Processing Rules

I also recommend you to have a look at the in-app help - the help content that is available within the apps. You can access it via the question mark button at the top right corner.

Automated processing rules can post bank statement items and clear open items in the system automatically. 

Best regards,

Anita

entry.title: Re: Stock Availability Access
entry.content: No, there is no standard app that shows ATP quantities for multiple materials.

entry.title: Re: Dear experts, In SAC, I have a distinct Cost center a...
entry.content: One member cannot has two different parent in one hierarchy.

entry.title: Re: COGS split into fixed and variable in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Achintya,

To get the product cost split by fixed and variable cost:

1. Need to define in cost component structure - whether a cost component is variable only of fixed and variable nature.

2. If the cost component is of fixed and variable nature, for example like labor cost - please maintain the fixed and variable cost in activity price maintenance.

3. All costs that are relevant for material inputs like - raw materials, packaging costs should be set as variable in the cost components.

4. Any overhead calculation cost components will be designed as fixed costs in cost components.

With you can see the product cost break down by fixed and variable in standard cost reports.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Orders - Automatic Extraction (I): Introduction
entry.content: "Thank you for the useful document. Could you please tell me how to link a custom document schema of the type purchase_order with the application Create sales order automation by default?"

check your material master record and make sure that all views relevant for inventory management are properly maintained for the plant / storage location.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Dear experts, In SAC, I have a distinct Cost center a...
entry.content: Right William.. that is a fundamental construct but is there any way to handle such cases from Modelling standpoint..

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023 FPS2
entry.content:
Dear @PiyushaBuldeo 

Thanks for the reply.

We have tried everything but not successful to do custom enhancement in Change request, hence we went with Claim Management from ERP side.

Unfortunately CPM does not have many standard enhancement spot hence it is difficult to map business requirements especially in On-prem or Private Cloud version. 

Hope SAP will add more enhancements spots including screen extension BAdi in the future to make CPM more business friendly.

Thanks

Abdul

entry.title: Re: Error running step by step to generate ABAP Flight Reference Scenario tables
entry.content: You can't create a new entry in abapGit if one entry already exists for the same URL. Click Show all to display all entries, find the one corresonding to the URL, then pull the code again.

entry.title: Re: Sub-Phases for PPM Project
entry.content: SAP has confirmed that it is not possible to add Sub-Phase even with enhancement

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD importing .mtar file error
entry.content:
Can you check if you see the projects that fail to import in web preview dashboard?

To me this sounds like that there might have been some issue during the initial import, but from build apps side the import had been successful.

entry.title: Get Hands-On Workshops with SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
We’ve designed the SAP Data & Analytics Discovery Days Program—a set of complimentary, hands-on virtual workshops built for IT leaders and Line-of-Business (LOB) users. Delivered in partnership with our trusted SAP partner ecosystem, these workshops focus on turning your data into real, immediate outcomes with SAP Business Data Cloud. 

What You’ll Learn 
Join SAP experts and partners to explore how to: 

  • Connect data and AI tools across your existing systems 
  • Unite planning and analytics to speed up decision-making 
  • Embed reliable, scalable AI into business processes 
  • Standardize data models for consistent reporting and access 

Why It’s Worth Your Time 
Whether you’re leading transformation from IT or executing strategy in a business unit, these workshops will help you close the gap between insight and action. You’ll leave with practical tools, real-world examples, and a clearer path to using SAP Business Data Cloud to drive smarter, faster decisions. 

Register now to select the sessions, topics, and times that work best for your team. 
Register for Workshops in North America  
Register for Workshops in Europe  
Register for Workshops in Latin America

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2023 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
Hi @Volker_Ruof 

Thank you for the valuable contributions you’re making to the Time Management solution.

And you need a reference date. This is necessary to define from which date the base unit shall start. Currently it is allowed to choose only the first of a month. So, you can´t create valulations that run from 15th january till 27th of September (and I never heard of such a requirement, drop me a note if you have got one).


The reference date and the base units might be enhanced in the future to enable different valuations, like for example "rolling 10 days", but for the beginning we start with the above mentioned options. But you see already that with this fields there is the theoretical possibility to become quite flexible !

We’ve received specific requests from customers about payroll processing scenarios where time valuation results need to span from the previous month's second half through the current month's first half. This requires greater flexibility in defining the reference date—ideally supporting mid-month or rolling valuation periods.

Given this requirement, we’d appreciate your insights on the tentative roadmap for enhancements to the reference date and base unit functionality. Is there a planned timeline or consideration for supporting more dynamic valuation periods in the near future?

Looking forward to your feedback.

Thanks,

Venugopal Chowdhary

entry.title: Re: Access https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/GWSAMPLE_BASIC/ doesn't work
entry.content: It has been retired: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/getting-server-reached-when-going-to-login-in-es5-trial-system/qaq-p/12808178

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
I fixed the issue by applying license after the installation. Below are the steps

  1. Install and run the docker image. Cannot login in GUI as default license is expired.
  2. Get the Hardware key from the terminal.
  3. Get the license from minisap using hardware key.
  4. Copy the license into the running container by command 
docker cp <local path the key file> a4h:/opt/sap/ASABAP_license
  •  Trigger license update. 
docker exec -it a4h /usr/local/bin/asabap_license_update​
  • Now login into GUI and check in SLICENSE t-code.
  • Now on every restart whenever the Hardware key changes. License should be valid.

entry.title: Re: Story Report Enablement
entry.content:
Hi Arren_C,

 

You can find all details in this IDP document:  https://d.dam.sap.com/a/JPG32pq/SAP%20SuccessFactors%20Stories%20in%20People%20Analytics-Enablement%20Configuraiton-V1.3.pdf?rc=10&inline=true

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields CPM
entry.content:
Hi

Unfortunately there is no standard enhancement available for CPM to add custom fields. Only option is to make changes to standard webdynpro app and store the details in a custom table. Enhancing the standard table will be a nightmare.

@Rahul_Jalan

entry.title: Re: 2023 Release Highlights in Seconds: SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition
entry.content: Great blog Nobby, we still miss you down under!

entry.title: Re: Posting rejected (UPDATE_REJECT).Order 104XXXX could...
entry.content:
Hello Jeremy_Deo,
Above mentioned points are possible cause for the Posting rejected  error.                                                                                                                                         
Thank You for reply

entry.title: Re: SAC ODE Story error
entry.content: I got this problem when entering 2025. It was connected to a table in the story. In the table, I had a filter on a certain time period passed time. When entering the new year of 2025, we did not longer load data for that period which I had filter on. Updated the time filter and it solved the problem. For the record, I'm still in "Enable Reporting Layout" which was suggested here earlier, but that still works to me. // Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Can we link in Reporting if the candidate is the same...
entry.content:
Hi Wanda3,

This is not standard. You would require to have the candidate ID or Application ID in the. Job Information table. I have seen this with some customers. The application ID or Candidate ID gets written from RCM to EC / Job Information when the person is hired. With reporting you can then always link it back to the Job Requisition, Application and Candidate.

Kind regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: Re: Credit Limit based on sales area or credit segment in...
entry.content:
Dear @hasan_ahmed1,

We need to assign the credit control Area to the different company in the below path, 

Goto SPRO --> Enterprise structure --> Assignment --> Financial accounting --> Assigning Company code to credit control area.
The sales area configuration is not required for this as we are having different company codes in this case.

We need to have different credit control area and Credit segment for each company codes.
Hope this helps!!!

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Aggregate Values o...
entry.content:
Hi @guenay

I am not clear about the "dynamic date" you mentioned. How can we know the dates "202501" to "202503"? Is it a fixed date or the previous 3 months from the current month(today: 16-Apr)? 

One more case is below,

202501–202503 → 202604

202502–202504 → 202605

...

202511–202601 → 202702

202512–202602 → 202703

 

Regards,

Moonjun

entry.title: Re: Firebase Authentication Error in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: @timokapanen , we have some news? thanks.

entry.title: Re: COGS split into fixed and variable in Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi, We have a Labour activity and in cost component structure it is defined as fixed and variable. In product costing reports we are able to see fixed and variable cost separately but the issue is when we sell the material to customer we want to see the fixed and variable breakup in Market segment report (cost of goods sold split) . When we configure cost of goods sold split, is there an option to post fixed value and variable value to different GL accounts?

entry.title: Re: Additional report templates for Status and Trends Review reports
entry.content:
Dear @Rahul_Jalan 

Thank you for the detailed post.

Request you to kindly create a blog on adding custom fields to Master Project, Risk Register, Issue Register, Change Request etc.

Thanks

Abdul
SAP Commercial Project Management

entry.title: Re: MDK - Obtain section name from context in QueryOption...
entry.content: Thanks for your reaction Bill. If opening a feature request is the way to go, then it appears that is what we should do. I do hope these proxy classes will be added in the future, this would facilitate certain developments to an immense extent.

entry.title: How to attach file to Q&A and Blog Posts in Community 2024 ?
entry.content:
Is it planned to allow attaching a file to questions, answers, blog posts and comments? Currently, only links are allowed (i.e. publish the file in an external Web site and insert its link).

For instance, let's say I want to attach some source code with 100 or more lines, it's not really relevant to include it right into the question, but to attach it as a text file.

Also, if I want to add 2 or more text files (e.g. code as Git), that would be nice to accept ZIP files too.

If the policy is to not allow attaching files, do SAP Community recommend one external Web site to store and persist them?

Thank you.

Sandra

PS: apologies if the question was already asked but I couldn't find it.

entry.title: Re: Changing my universal ID from S USER to P USER
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

Good day! 

Any recommendation that you can provide?

The email was change to my personal email but the universal is still the S User. 

I wanted to change the UID from my S User to my P User. 

Thanks,

 Joerom Ramos

entry.title: Re: Access https://sapes5.sapdevcenter.com/sap/opu/odata/...
entry.content: More info, Solved: Getting Server Reached when going to login in es5 ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Request for Hamburg - ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
entry.content:
Thank you. We have received your request and put it into our planning board. The topic expert will be in touch soon.

Best regards,

Eberechukwu Nwaobiora

entry.title: Re: Transport Model from Dev to Prod
entry.content:
Hi Jain,

Best practice here is to create a connection in Dev and then transport the connection to Prod. In Prod you adjust the credentials, environment, etc. to match you Prod data source. When you build a model based on the connection in Dev and transport the model to Prod it will use this connection because it has the same ID as an object in your tenants. You don't transport the connection.

Kind regards,
Martijn van Foeken | Interdobs

entry.title: Changing my UID
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

Good day! 

I wanted to change my UID from S User to my P User. 

Any steps how to do that?

Currently I was able to change universal email to my personal account but my UID is still my S User. 

Thanks,

 Joerom Ramos

entry.title: Re: Identity Directory API specification is broken
entry.content: Hi, I've had the same issue. After opening a ticket with SAP they comfirmed the open API spec file is getting evaluated as an invalid file due to the presence of references to external third party sites in it. They sent me a new file that is working for me now. Hopefully they will update the Business Accelerator Hub file soon. I am not able to upload the API spec file in this forum.

entry.title: Re: Email Notification for Completed Supplier Invoice App...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

Yes, MRM_COIV_WF_APPROVE is applicable when using the “Create Supplier Invoice” app and clicking “Save as Completed”

When you use the Create Supplier Invoice – Advanced app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and:

  • You click the Save as Completed button,
  • AND you have a workflow active for "Parked as Complete" invoices (scenario WS00800303),

Then the invoice is considered complete and submitted for approval via the workflow.

Once the invoice is approved in that workflow, the MRM_COIV_WF_APPROVE email template is triggered.

 

I hope this will help answer your last question 😊.

Best regards,

Jeremy
